text:
Ashes on The Fire -PTV- is the 3rd track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 3rd track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto, and released eleven days early on June 11, 2022.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of Ashes on The Fire.

-PTV- = Promotional Video Trailer Version or Part Two Version, likely.

All occurrences

Episode 76 - Marleyan soldiers fight against the Jaegerists
Special 2 and Episode 92 - Falco's Titan arrives in the nick of time
